name: retriever
description: Company-site job intelligence for job seekers.

interface.shortDescription: Company-site job intelligence for job seekers.
interface.longDescription: Retriever acts as a scoped career coach and reconnaissance tool for job seekers. It asks the user for resume and search preferences before creating a local USER.md profile, searches company career sites with Chrome, stores findings in SQLite under ~/.retriever, warns about prompt-injection content, ranks and exports job reports, and never submits applications.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Retriever job-search profile.
Check my target companies for new jobs.
Show my full Retriever job report.
